since_last: 57% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.34%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -0.94% · Gold +0.05% · Nasdaq100 -1.87%. 57% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.34%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.34%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.62%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SAP is the standout at +4.86%
cards.body: Leaders: SAP +4.86%, DLR +4.27%, UPST +3.12%, INTC +2.68%, EQIX +1.98%. Laggards: SKHY -3.12%, MU -1.64%, BABA -1.62%, CGNX -1.51%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.40% at $117.77
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.40% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
